Support
Product support included
What's Product Support?
In the event your product doesn't work as expected or you need help using it, Amazon offers free product support options such as live phone/chat with an Amazon associate, manufacturer contact information, step-by-step troubleshooting guides, and help videos. By solving product issues, we help the planet by extending the life of products. Availability of support options differ by product and country. Learn more
Payment
Secure transaction
Your transaction is secure
We work hard to protect your security and privacy. Our payment security system encrypts your information during transmission. We don’t share your credit card details with third-party sellers, and we don’t sell your information to others. Learn more

      About this item

      • WHY GALAXY WATCH8 CLASSIC: Timeless design.* New lug system for easy band detachment & replacement.* Advanced health & sleep tracking features for total body wellness.* Improved user interface.* Personal AI assistant for hands free help.¹* 2-Yr Warranty
      • BUILT TO PERFORM. DESIGNED TO IMPRESS: Show off your style with an iconic design that blends tradition with cutting-edge innovation.¹ A brighter screen makes everything easy to see, and a rotating bezel gives you access to your favorite apps
      • YOUR EVERY COMMAND, RIGHT ON YOUR WRIST: Get a little extra help with day-to-day tasks. Galaxy Watch 8 Classic features a personal AI assistant¹ that helps you get things done hands-free. Simply speak the command and your Watch makes it happen
      • UNLOCK THE SECRETS TO BETTER SLEEP: When you get good sleep, it feels like anything is possible. Start each day with more energy and better focus using Advanced Sleep Coaching² - improved with even more ways to help you sleep smarter
      • QUICK UPDATES, AT A GLANCE: Get updates, select apps and more with Now Bar³,⁴ and an improved user experience. Now Bar conveniently puts the info you use the most - like weather, news and more - right on your main Watch screen
      • YOUR RUNNING GOALS, AT YOUR PACE: From a mile to a marathon, unleash the winning runner within using Running Coach.⁵ Your Watch analyzes factors⁶ such as your age, weight, oxygen levels and heart rate to guide you through your run
      • POWER FOR FAST-PACED LIFESTYLES: Your active lifestyle needs a watch that can keep up with you. Stay powered up and in charge with a battery that’s built for even your busiest days.⁷
      • CHECK YOUR BLOOD PRESSURE: Keep track of your blood pressure⁸ conveniently with your Galaxy Watch8. Simply calibrate the Watch using a blood pressure cuff (sold separately) to measure your systolic and diastolic pressure. Then, use the readings on the Samsung Health Monitor app to help monitor your blood pressure as part of maintaining a healthy lifestyle. Check for changes in your heart’s activity to make informed decisions, such as changing your diet or scheduling a visit to the doctor’s office.
      • YOUR DAILY WELLNESS SNAPSHOT: Stay in the know about your wellness using Energy Score with Galaxy AI.⁹ It’s a score based off yesterday’s sleep, activity and heart rate¹⁰, all collected by your Galaxy Watch 8 Classic
      • WATCH PAIRS WITH YOUR ANDROID SMARTPHONE: Galaxy Watch works seamlessly with Samsung phones and also works with other Android phones.¹¹ Download the Galaxy Wearable and Samsung Health apps to get started using Galaxy Watch with your device.
      Show more
      › See more product details

      Product Description

      Galaxy Watch8 Classic is more than a watch —it’s an elegant timepiece with traditional style that helps keep your day on track.

      ¹Gemini mobile app available on select devices, languages, and countries. Requires compatible Wear OS watch to be connected to a compatible device. Check responses for accuracy. Internet connection and setup may be required. Features may differ depending on subscription and account. Results for illustrative purposes and may vary. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google LLC. ²Galaxy AI features track data and require compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ³Requires Wi-Fi connection and Samsung and Google accounts. Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ⁴Must be signed into your Samsung and Google accounts, and be connected to the internet directly (by Wi-Fi or LTE model) or via a compatible Samsung Galaxy AI phone. ⁵Available for outdoor running only; requires at least 12 minutes of running with GPS on and initial setup. Galaxy AI features track data and require compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ⁶Not intended for medical use. ⁷Based on typical use; results may vary. ⁸Requires initial and periodic calibrations every 28 days using a third-party blood pressure cuff, sold separately. Read and follow instructions to calibrate the blood pressure function. Compatible with Android 12 or later, Watch/Wear OS 4.0. The blood pressure function is not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease. Consult your physician if you have any questions or concerns about your medical condition or treatment. ⁹Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ¹⁰The heart rate software functions are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease. ¹¹Certain features not available with non-Samsung Android mobile devices, such as certain AI features including Energy Score insight, and ECG, Sleep Apnea, Do Not Disturb and Bedtime Sync. See samsung.com/us/support/answer/ANS10004668/ to learn more about feature compatibility with non-Samsung Android devices.

      How customer reviews and ratings work

      Customer Reviews, including Product Star Ratings help customers to learn more about the product and decide whether it is the right product for them.

      To calculate the overall star rating and percentage breakdown by star, we don’t use a simple average. Instead, our system considers things like how recent a review is and if the reviewer bought the item on Amazon. It also analyzed reviews to verify trustworthiness.

      Learn more how customers reviews work on Amazon

      Customers say

      Customers find the smartwatch to be an excellent timepiece that looks good. The battery life receives mixed feedback, with some customers reporting good performance while others find it lacking. Durability is also mixed, with some customers finding it durable while others report issues. Compatibility receives mixed reviews, with one customer noting it only works with Samsung phones.

      • jerod cruickshank
        5 out of 5 stars
        Good watch
        Reviewed in the United States on May 24, 2026
        Color: BlackSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 Classic
        Verified Purchase
        Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
        Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

        Good so far, I replaced my Google pixel watch 3 for this and it seems to check the boxes for freedom and ease of use. Not sure about durability I haven't dropped it yet to confirm but I put a case on it anyways, it looks good so if you raw dog it with no case and you don't do any hard work I think it'll hold up fine. Battery life seems to be an "eh" to me right now theoretically it should hold up longer than my old watch but it seems to be dying faster, I'll make an edit to confirm later.

        Edit: the battery is miles better I'm actually surprised from 7am-4pm my battery dropped to 89% from 100%, my pixel watch 3 would be at 50% by now lol

          I’ve been using the Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic for a few days now, and I’m seriously impressed. The rotating bezel feels premium and makes navigation super easy, the display is large, bright and smooth, and the health tracking features are accurate and helpful. Battery life has been solid, and it pairs seamlessly with my phone. It looks classy enough for everyday wear but still packed with smart features. Definitely worth the upgrade!

          Great watch. No complaints except there are key functions that only work with a Samsung phone. I have a Pixel and didn't know this. I'm not convinced that Samsung couldn't fix this and make a Wear OS watch work with all devices. (We only need one watch cult, and we already have Apple) Otherwise, it's a 5 star.

          I purchased this watch as a it went into lockdown for 10 minutes! This happened 3 times making it useless. This watch is to expensive for this issue. So, I did research and found that this is a known issue with the watch 8 classic. I ended up giving them my watch Ultra until the new watch Ultra arrives. I will not recommend this watch 8 Classic for this reason.

          And I am a die-hard Samsung person. Heart breaking because it's a beautiful watch.

          Reviewed in the United States on May 31, 2026
          Color: WhiteSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 Classic

          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          The Good: It's a very solid watch. The screen is very easy to read. The battery lasts twice as long as the watch it replaced. It's got a whole lotta health features.

          The Bad: I'm not sold on the esthetics of a combination circle/square watch. Samsung should have picked one, not both.

          The Ugly: Setup is downright diabolical. I was on the phone with Verizon for two hours. Fortunately, this procedure only has to get done once.

          Love this watch! Battery life could be better, lasts about 36hrs on heavy use compared to my Garmin tactix solar 3 weeks battery life.

          Got it mainly because I have a samsung phone (s25 ultra) and I wanted to monitor my health and sleep habits. There it works seamlessly and would highly recommend for anyone trying to do the same!

        • Ray Bisczat
          5 out of 5 stars
          A Smartwatch for Traditional Watch Enthusiasts
          Reviewed in the United States on July 30, 2025
          Color: BlackSize: 46mmStyle: LTEPattern Name: Watch8 Classic
          Verified Purchase
          Brief content visible, double tap to read full content.
          Full content visible, double tap to read brief content.

          I've had the watch for about a week, and I am impressed so far. I am a traditional watch guy and was skeptical about a smartwatch. The classic design makes this watch look more like a traditional dive watch vs. a piece of tech on your arm. My wife wanted me to have a smartwatch for health monitoring. This watch is perfect for that, a good combination of function and design. I really like the health and fitness features - my natural competitiveness is already motivating me to achieve better numbers all around. One watch-out, the full suite of health and fitness features require a Samsung phone - I got a new phone to support my new watch (with trade-in value it was not too bad a hit). I have to get used to charging the watch regularly which I don't have to do with a traditional watch - lunch time seems to be a good window for me. Overall, I am very happy with the watch.

          Read moreRead less

        Product Summary: Samsung Galaxy Watch 8 Classic (2025) 46mm LTE Smartwatch, Cushion Design, Rotating Bezel, Quick Button, Sleep Coaching, Running Coach, Energy Score, Black [US Version, 2 Yr Warranty]

        From Samsung

        4.2 out of 5 stars, 85 ratings

        Customer reviews

        50+ bought in past month

        Price

        One-time purchase: $469.91 15% Savings

        List Price: $549.99

        Purchasing options

        Other sellers

        Other sellers

        About this Item

        • WHY GALAXY WATCH8 CLASSIC: Timeless design.* New lug system for easy band detachment & replacement.* Advanced health & sleep tracking features for total body wellness.* Improved user interface.* Personal AI assistant for hands free help.¹* 2-Yr Warranty
        • BUILT TO PERFORM. DESIGNED TO IMPRESS: Show off your style with an iconic design that blends tradition with cutting-edge innovation.¹ A brighter screen makes everything easy to see, and a rotating bezel gives you access to your favorite apps
        • YOUR EVERY COMMAND, RIGHT ON YOUR WRIST: Get a little extra help with day-to-day tasks. Galaxy Watch 8 Classic features a personal AI assistant¹ that helps you get things done hands-free. Simply speak the command and your Watch makes it happen
        • UNLOCK THE SECRETS TO BETTER SLEEP: When you get good sleep, it feels like anything is possible. Start each day with more energy and better focus using Advanced Sleep Coaching² - improved with even more ways to help you sleep smarter
        • QUICK UPDATES, AT A GLANCE: Get updates, select apps and more with Now Bar³,⁴ and an improved user experience. Now Bar conveniently puts the info you use the most - like weather, news and more - right on your main Watch screen
        • YOUR RUNNING GOALS, AT YOUR PACE: From a mile to a marathon, unleash the winning runner within using Running Coach.⁵ Your Watch analyzes factors⁶ such as your age, weight, oxygen levels and heart rate to guide you through your run
        • POWER FOR FAST-PACED LIFESTYLES: Your active lifestyle needs a watch that can keep up with you. Stay powered up and in charge with a battery that’s built for even your busiest days.⁷
        • CHECK YOUR BLOOD PRESSURE: Keep track of your blood pressure⁸ conveniently with your Galaxy Watch8. Simply calibrate the Watch using a blood pressure cuff (sold separately) to measure your systolic and diastolic pressure. Then, use the readings on the Samsung Health Monitor app to help monitor your blood pressure as part of maintaining a healthy lifestyle. Check for changes in your heart’s activity to make informed decisions, such as changing your diet or scheduling a visit to the doctor’s office.
        • YOUR DAILY WELLNESS SNAPSHOT: Stay in the know about your wellness using Energy Score with Galaxy AI.⁹ It’s a score based off yesterday’s sleep, activity and heart rate¹⁰, all collected by your Galaxy Watch 8 Classic
        • WATCH PAIRS WITH YOUR ANDROID SMARTPHONE: Galaxy Watch works seamlessly with Samsung phones and also works with other Android phones.¹¹ Download the Galaxy Wearable and Samsung Health apps to get started using Galaxy Watch with your device.

        Product Description

        Galaxy Watch8 Classic is more than a watch —it’s an elegant timepiece with traditional style that helps keep your day on track.

        ¹Gemini mobile app available on select devices, languages, and countries. Requires compatible Wear OS watch to be connected to a compatible device. Check responses for accuracy. Internet connection and setup may be required. Features may differ depending on subscription and account. Results for illustrative purposes and may vary. Google and Gemini are trademarks of Google LLC. ²Galaxy AI features track data and require compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ³Requires Wi-Fi connection and Samsung and Google accounts. Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ⁴Must be signed into your Samsung and Google accounts, and be connected to the internet directly (by Wi-Fi or LTE model) or via a compatible Samsung Galaxy AI phone. ⁵Available for outdoor running only; requires at least 12 minutes of running with GPS on and initial setup. Galaxy AI features track data and require compatible Samsung Galaxy phone, Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ⁶Not intended for medical use. ⁷Based on typical use; results may vary. ⁸Requires initial and periodic calibrations every 28 days using a third-party blood pressure cuff, sold separately. Read and follow instructions to calibrate the blood pressure function. Compatible with Android 12 or later, Watch/Wear OS 4.0. The blood pressure function is not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease. Consult your physician if you have any questions or concerns about your medical condition or treatment. ⁹Galaxy AI features track data and require a compatible Galaxy wearable device (sold separately), Samsung Health app and Samsung account. ¹⁰The heart rate software functions are not intended for use in the diagnosis of disease or other conditions, or in the cure, mitigation, treatment or prevention of disease. ¹¹Certain features not available with non-Samsung Android mobile devices, such as certain AI features including Energy Score insight, and ECG, Sleep Apnea, Do Not Disturb and Bedtime Sync. See samsung.com/us/support/answer/ANS10004668/ to learn more about feature compatibility with non-Samsung Android devices.
